query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, u.name, u.created_at,
       a.membership_tier, a.membership_type, a.onboarding_step, a.onboarding_completed_at,
       a.joining_fee_paid_at, a.jlt_email
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles a ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'katholidays.uk@gmail.com';

SELECT js.id, js.user_id, js.membership_tier, js.membership_type, js.joining_fee_paid_at,
       js.billing_request_id, js.billing_request_flow_id, js.created_at
FROM join_sessions js
JOIN users u ON u.id = js.user_id
WHERE u.email = 'katholidays.uk@gmail.com';

SELECT gm.id, gm.user_id, gm.mandate_id, gm.status, gm.preferred_payment_day,
       gm.joining_fee_paid_at, gm.created_at
FROM gc_mandates gm
JOIN users u ON u.id = gm.user_id
WHERE u.email = 'katholidays.uk@gmail.com';

SELECT gs.id, gs.user_id, gs.subscription_id, gs.amount, gs.start_date,
       gs.day_of_month, gs.next_charge_date, gs.status, gs.created_at
FROM gc_subscriptions gs
JOIN users u ON u.id = gs.user_id
WHERE u.email = 'katholidays.uk@gmail.com';
